zones.name: Scripts Zone
zones.belief: Deployment and environment setup scripts for launching the Terminus client and the native Terminus backend.

zones.name: Seed Zone
zones.belief: Coherence lab context injections, configuration presets, and toolset definitions imported directly into the user’s mind.

zones.name: User Zone
zones.belief: The active continuity footprint: contains persistent runtime state, conversation traces, dynamically loaded plugins, custom prompt pieces, and workspace databases.

zones.name: Documentation
zones.belief: User-facing and internal documentation for this codebase.
